artifacts.summary: Int-specific BFMCS construction for completeness theorem
Implementation summary documenting changes and sorry inventory

review_reason: Implementation wires completeness theorem but relies on 3 underlying sorries: modal_backward (single-family limitation), intFMCS_forward_F, and intFMCS_backward_P (dovetailing gap). These represent real mathematical content gaps requiring dovetailing chain and/or modal saturation to resolve.
